overview: Todooo is a two-component cloud-native task management system: a React SPA frontend and a Go backend API. The frontend communicates with the backend over HTTPS/REST using JWT-based session cookies, and the backend persists users, categories, and tasks in an embedded/in-memory store abstraction.
requirements: Users register with unique email and password; passwords hashed with bcrypt
Login validates credentials and issues a 7-day session (JWT in HttpOnly cookie)
CRUD tasks with title (required), description, due date, category, completion status
Unique ID per task; title non-empty validation
Custom categories per user; filter by category including Uncategorized
Filter by all/active/completed; sort by due date asc/desc
Due dates from today through +10 years; overdue highlighting
Strict per-user data isolation; 403 on accessing other users' resources
<500ms CRUD response; support 100 concurrent users; up to 1000 tasks per user
Responsive UI; success/error toasts; local draft persistence of unsaved forms

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todooo API
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: /api
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
  /auth/register:
    post:
      summary: Register a new user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email: { type: string, format: email }
                password: { type: string, minLength: 8 }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '409': { description: Email exists }
  /auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Login
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK, sets session cookie }
        '401': { description: Invalid credentials }
  /auth/logout:
    post:
      summary: Logout
      responses:
        '204': { description: Session terminated }
  /auth/me:
    get:
      summary: Current user
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
        '401': { description: Unauthorized }
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List categories
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
    post:
      summary: Create category
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties: { name: { type: string } }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
  /categories/{id}:
    delete:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Deleted }
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List tasks
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: category
          schema: { type: string }
        - in: query
          name: status
          schema: { type: string, enum: [all, active, completed] }
        - in: query
          name: sort
          schema: { type: string, enum: [due_asc, due_desc] }
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
    post:
      summary: Create task
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [title]
              properties:
                title: { type: string, minLength: 1 }
                description: { type: string }
                dueDate: { type: string, format: date }
                categoryId: { type: string, nullable: true }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '400': { description: Validation error }
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
        '403': { description: Forbidden }
        '404': { description: Not found }
    put:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
                description: { type: string }
                dueDate: { type: string, format: date, nullable: true }
                categoryId: { type: string, nullable: true }
                completed: { type: boolean }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Updated }
        '403': { description: Forbidden }
    delete:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Deleted }
        '403': { description: Forbidden }
components.componentAgentInstructions: Build a Go backend using net/http on port 9090. Use an in-memory thread-safe store (sync.RWMutex) with maps for users, categories, and tasks; design storage behind an interface so it could be swapped later. Use bcrypt (golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt) for password hashing. Issue JWT (github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5) with 7-day expiry set as HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax cookie named 'session'. Implement CSRF via double-submit cookie: issue 'csrf' cookie (non-HttpOnly) on login; require matching X-CSRF-Token header on POST/PUT/DELETE. Endpoints per OpenAPI. Validate task title non-empty; validate dueDate is between today and +10 years when provided. Enforce per-user ownership on every task/category access and return 403 otherwise. Support query filters (category, status=all|active|completed) and sort (due_asc|due_desc; nulls last). GET /tasks returns up to 1000 items. Enable CORS for the web app origin with credentials. Provide GET /health returning 200 JSON {"status":"ok"}. Use UUIDs for IDs. Log errors; return user-friendly JSON {error:string}. Dockerfile: multi-stage Go build, final distroless/alpine, EXPOSE 9090.

components.name: todo-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todooo Web
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
components.componentAgentInstructions: Build a React + TypeScript SPA using Vite. Use React Router for /login, /register, /tasks, /categories. Use a simple state library (Zustand or React Context). Call the todo-api via fetch with credentials:'include' and X-CSRF-Token header read from the csrf cookie. Pages: Register, Login, Tasks (list with filters: all/active/completed, category dropdown, sort by due date asc/desc), Task form modal (title required, description, due date picker limited to today..+10y, category select), Categories manager. Visually highlight overdue tasks (dueDate < today && !completed) in red; strike-through completed tasks. Confirm dialog before delete. Display toast messages on success/error. Persist unsaved form data to localStorage keyed by form, clear on submit/cancel. Responsive CSS (Tailwind or CSS modules) for desktop/tablet/mobile. Format dates with Intl.DateTimeFormat. Serve via nginx:alpine on port 8080; include /health static file returning 200. Build stage: node:20-alpine. Nginx config should proxy /api to the BACKEND_URL env or rely on ingress; default to relative /api. Include a small runtime config.js generated from env at container start for API base URL.
